meta.name: ETH RWA market - resolve sUSDat on existing EulerRouter
meta.description: Adds sUSDat as a resolved ERC4626 vault on the existing mAPOLLO/RWA market EulerRouter. Router governor is AlphaGrowth multisig 0x4f894Bfc9481110278C356adE1473eBe2127Fd3C. This enables router pricing resolution sUSDat -> USDat via convertToAssets; it does not list a vault, set LTVs, or change caps.
